limitations: The mixed curvature contribution is represented by existing topographic/operator sectors after v2.11.

rows.limitation: Diagonal curvature is the reference operator package.
Hopf twist curvature remains in the Hopf operator channel.
Higgs-selected U1/fiber curvature is represented by Hopf and boundary terms.
Base curvature is represented by diagonal/base and boundary bookkeeping.
Boundary functional curvature is represented by V_boundary.
Chirality contribution is represented by chiral projector terms.
Sector coupling is already represented and bounded in the operator package.
Higgs-U1 curvature remains in Hopf/boundary channels.
Lift/profile curvature is represented by lift and PSD profile operators.
Scalar/topographic leakage is screened or lifted by existing scaffold obligations.
Mirror curvature is represented by chiral/Higgs-U1/boundary channels; mirror theorem remains downstream.
v2.11 forbids an independent mixed coefficient and represents mixed curvature topographically.
rows.mapped_to: V_boundary + V_PSD/profile + scalar/topographic screened sector + P_perp_lift

title: BHSM v2.9 Curvature Formula to Operator Map
